items: Conor Camplisson is accepted into the UW CoMotion Postdoctoral Entrepreneurship Program. Congrats, Conor!

A paper led by Ben Mallory (Stergachis and Starita labs) in which Conor Herlihy participated—Chromatin architectures underlying plasmid-based assays for regulatory variant effects—is published in Molecular Cell. Congrats, Conor!
Thea Layman (UW Molecular, Cellular & Developmental Biology) joins the lab as a summer undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Thea!

A paper led by Peter Ly’s lab in which Conor Herlihy and Mary Krebs participated—Genome instability triggers intercellular DNA transfer between human cells—is published in Cell. Congrats, Conor and Mary!

A preprint co-led by Conor Herlihy and Lidan Li and featuring contributions from Mary Krebs, Conor Kelly, Nico Longhi, and Olivia Weissenfels—A unified photosensitizer platform for in situ DNA-, RNA-, and protein-directed proximity labeling—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats all!
Mary Krebs is awarded an NSF GRFP. Congrats, Mary!
Hunter Jung is awarded a Lafayette Fellowship. Congrats, Hunter!

A paper co-led by Yuzhen Liu and Christopher McGann and featuring contributions from Conor Herlihy, Mary Krebs, Thomas Perkins, Conor Camplisson, David Nwizugbo, and Nico Longhi—DNA O-MAP uncovers the molecular neighborhoods associated with specific genomic loci—is published in eLife. Congrats all!
A preprint in which Sahar Attar participated—Multimodal analysis of molecular remodeling in aging spleen identified global and cell type specific changes—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats, Sahar!
Eva K. Nichols departs to become an AI Scientist at the Seattle Children’s Research Institute. Congrats, Eva—and farewell!
Shreyansh Padhy (UW Engineering) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Shreyansh!
Gajanan Dhongade (UW Computer Science) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Gajanan!
Harshita Keerthipati (UW Computer Science) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Harshita!
Krishna Pratheek Madamala (UW Engineering) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Krishna!
Kiara Dote (UW Molecular Cellular and Developmental Biology) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Kiara!
Olivia Weissenfels joins the lab as a rotation student (GS). Welcome, Olivia!
Julia Glasser joins the lab as a MSDS Master's student. Welcome, Julia!
David Nwizugbo decides to relocate to one of the few places rainier and darker than Seattle. David heads off to London to start his MS at Queen Mary University. Congrats, David—and farewell!
Val Browning heads off to start his PhD in the MCB program. Congrats, Val—and farewell!

A paper led by Sahar Attar and Mary Krebs and featuring contributions from Eva K. Nichols—Performing SABER-FISH on Chromosome Spreads in Fixed Tissue Culture Cells and in Tissues—is published in Methods in Molecular Biology. Congrats all!
Aadyant Maity (UW Computer Science) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Aadyant!
Pratika Eswaran (UW Computer Science) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Pratika!
The lab goes ice skating! And out to lunch afterwards.
Chelsey Lin heads off to join the Rice Bioengineering PhD program. Congrats, Chelsey—and farewell!
Arin Meeks-Muradyan (UW Bioengineering) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Arin!
Gulnar Abulshova joins the lab as a Data Science Master's student. Welcome, Gulnar!
Ben Scott joins the lab as a summer REU researcher. Welcome, Ben!

A paper co-led by Eva K. Nichols and featuring contributions from Val Browning, Nico Longhi, Madison Sanchez-Forman and Conor Camplisson—Predicting cell cycle stage from 3D single-cell nuclear-stained images—is published in Life Science Alliance. Congrats all!
Val Browning is awarded a NSF GRFP. Congrats, Val!
Yuzhen Liu starts her new position as a Scientist I at the Allen Institute for Neural Dynamics. Congrats, Yuzhen—and farewell!
Yuzhen Liu successfully defends her thesis. Congrats, Dr. Liu!

A paper led by Sahar Attar and featuring contributions from Val Browning, Mary Krebs, Yuzhen Liu, and Eva K. Nichols—Efficient and highly amplified imaging of nucleic acid targets in cellular and histopathological samples with pSABER—is published in Nature Methods. Congrats all!

A preprint led by David Shechner's lab in which Elliot Hershberg participated—Nascent transcript O-MAP reveals the molecular architecture of a single-locus subnuclear compartment built by RBM20 and the TTN RNA—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats all!

A paper led by David Shechner's lab in which Elliot Hershberg participated—Multiomic characterization of RNA microenvironments by oligonucleotide-mediated proximity-interactome mapping—is published in Nature Methods. Congrats, Elliot!
Nicolas Longhi starts in his new role as a research assistant in the lab. Welcome back, Nico!
Madison Sanchez-Forman joins the lab as a MSDS Master's student. Welcome, Madison!
Eric Lian joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Eric!

A preprint co-led by Eva K. Nichols and featuring contributions from Val Browning, Nico Longhi, and Conor Camplisson—Predicting cell cycle stage from 3D single-cell nuclear-stained images—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats all!
Sahar Attar crushes the General Exam and officially becomes a PhD candidate. Congrats, Sahar!

A preprint co-led by Yuzhen Liu and featuring contributions from Mary Krebs, Conor Camplisson, and David Nwizugbo—DNA O-MAP uncovers the molecular neighborhoods associated with specific genomic loci—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats all!
The lab goes on a hike to Keekwulee Falls!
Conor Herlihy joins the lab as a postdoctoral fellow (joint with the Schweppe Lab). Welcome, Conor!
Conor Kelly crushes the General Exam and officially becomes a PhD candidate. Congrats, Conor!
Nicole Hang and Jaden Mattison join the lab as summer REU researchers. Welcome, Jaden and Nicole!
Monika Perez crushes the General Exam and officially becomes a PhD candidate. Congrats, Monika!
Conor Kelly is awarded a NSF GRFP. Congrats, Conor!
A paper co-led by Monika Perez and Conor Camplisson—Designing Oligonucleotide-Based FISH Probe Sets with PaintSHOP—is published in Methods in Molecular Biology. Congrats, Conor and Monika!
Eanya Devasagayam joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Eanya!
Lidan Li joins the lab as a postdoctoral fellow. Welcome, Lidan!

A paper led by Robin Aguilar and featuring contributions from Conor Camplisson and Chelsey Lin—Tigerfish designs oligonucleotide-based in situ hybridization probes targeting intervals of highly repetitive DNA at the scale of genomes—is published in Nature Communications. Congrats all!
Our new high performance image analysis workstation, "Ozymandias", arrives! The team is excited to circle lots of objects...
The lab journeys down the Burke Gilman trail for an end of quarter outing to Dough Zone.
The lab gets an early holiday present!
Robin Aguilar starts their new position as a Science Communication Specialist at A-Alpha Bio. Congrats, Robin—and farewell!
Robin Aguilar successfully defends their thesis. Congrats, Dr. Aguilar!
Hunter Jung (UW French) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher (joint with the Schweppe Lab). Welcome, Hunter!
Lawrie Brunswick joins the lab as a MSDS Master's student. Welcome, Lawrie!
Matthew Chaw (GS) joins the lab as a rotation student for the fall quarter. Welcome, Matt!
Nicolas Longhi returns to the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome back, Nico!
Chelsey Lin starts in her new role as a joint research assistant in the Shechner and Beliveau Labs. Welcome back, Chelsey!
David Nwizugbo starts in his new role as a research assistant in the lab. Welcome back, David!
Caleb Kono departs to start as a PhD student in the UW BPSD program. Congrats, Caleb—and farewell!
The lab wins a Lab Safety award in our annual inspection. Big thanks to Sahar (lead), Conor K., Mary, and Val for leading our safety and compliance efforts.
We have our annual lab retreat! Dumplings were consumed. Pins were felled.
Vincent Chau joins the lab as a Bioinformatics Intern. Welcome, Vincent!
Chandler Ault starts his new position as an intern at Exponential. Congrats, Chandler—and farewell!
Nicolas Longhi (UW Bioengineering) joins the lab as a UW GS Summer REU researcher. Welcome, Nicolas!
Conor Camplisson is awarded a Environmental Pathology/Toxicology predoctoral training grant. Congrats, Conor!
Sahar Attar (GS), Conor Kelly (GS), and Monika Perez (GS) join the lab for their dissertation research. Welcome, Monika, Conor, and Sahar!
The lab goes ice skating
Stephen Gonzalez (GS) joins the lab as a rotation student for the spring quarter. Welcome, Stephen!

A preprint led by Robin Aguilar and featuring contributions from Conor Camplisson and Chelsey Lin—Tigerfish designs oligonucleotide-based in situ hybridization probes targeting intervals of highly repetitive DNA at the scale of genomes—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats all!

A preprint led by Sahar Attar and featuring contributions from Val Browning, Yuzhen Liu, and Eva K. Nichols—Efficient and highly amplified imaging of nucleic acid targets in cellular and histopathological samples with pSABER—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats all!
A preprint led by David Shechner's lab in which Elliot Hershberg participated—Oligonucleotide-directed proximity-interactome mapping (O-MAP)—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats, Elliot!

A paper in collaboration with Bernhard Payer's lab in which Elliot Hershberg participated, Cohesin controls X chromosome structure remodeling and X-reactivation during mouse iPSC-reprogramming, is published in PNAS. Congrats, Elliot!
Conor Kelly (GS) and Connor Finkbeiner (GS) join the lab as rotation students for the winter quarter. Welcome, Connor and Conor!

A paper led by Jay Shendure's lab in which Eva K. Nichols and Melissa Phung-Rojas participated, Optimized single-nucleus transcriptional profiling by combinatorial indexing, is published in Nature Protocols. Congrats, Melissa and Eva!
Chandler Ault joins the lab as a MSDS Master's student. Welcome, Chandler!
Sahar Attar (GS) and Monika Perez (GS) join the lab as rotation students for the fall quarter. Welcome, Monika and Sahar!
Thomas A. Perkins, Jr. joins the lab as a research assistant. Welcome, Thomas!
Mary Krebs joins the lab as a research assistant. Welcome, Mary!
We have our annual lab retreat (in 2 parts) with visits to the Seattle Art Museum and the Van Gogh Immersive Experience!
A paper led by Lily Deng—An open source 16-channel fluidics system for automating sequential fluorescent in situ hybridization (FISH)-based imaging—is published in HardwareX. Congrats, Lily!
Caleb Kono (UW Biochemistry) joins the lab as a UW GS Summer REU researcher. Welcome, Caleb!
Chelsey Lin (UW Physiology) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Chelsey!
Saurabh Shukla starts his new position at Prescryptive Health as a Data Scientist. Congrats, Saurabh—and farewell!
Robin Aguilar's artwork is featured on the cover of ACS Chemical Biology. Congrats, Robin!
Melissa Phung-Rojas (Case Western Reserve University) returns to the lab as joint summer undergraduate researcher with the Shendure Lab. Welcome back, Melissa!

A paper in collaboration with Jonathan Liu's lab in which Eva K. Nichols participated, A hybrid open-top light-sheet microscope for versatile multi-scale imaging of cleared tissues, is published in Nature Methods. Congrats, Eva!
David Nwizugbo (UW Biochemistry) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, David!
Ben Mallory (GS) joins the lab as a rotation student for the spring quarter. Welcome, Ben!
Lily Deng starts her new position at RareCyte as a Computational Biology Scientist. Congrats, Lily—and farewell!
A preprint led by Lily Deng—An open source 16-channel fluidics system for automating sequential fluorescent in situ hybridization (FISH)-based imaging—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats, Lily!
Sahar Attar is accepted to and decides to enroll in the Genome Sciences PhD program. Congrats, Sahar!
Chris Hsu's CMAP Research and Education training fund application is selected for funding. Congrats, Chris!
Malvika Tejura (GS) joins the lab as a rotation student for the winter quarter. Welcome, Malvika!
Robin Aguilar has an abstract chosen for a poster presentation at the 2022 HHMI Investigator Science Meeting. Congrats, Robin!
Eva K. Nichols has an abstract chosen for a plenary "Blue Sky Ideas" session talk at the 4DN Annual Meeting. Congrats, Eva!
Robin Aguilar and Eva K. Nichols have abstracts chosen for poster presentations at the 4DN Annual Meeting. Congrats, Eva and Robin!
Valentino (Val) Browning joins the lab as a research assistant (joint with the Shendure Lab). Welcome, Val!

A preprint led by Jay Shendure's lab in which Eva K. Nichols and Melissa Phung-Rojas participated—An optimized protocol for single cell transcriptional profiling by combinatorial indexing—goes online at arXiv. Congrats, Eva and Melissa!
Eva K. Nichols is awarded a WRF Postdoctoral Fellowship. Congrats, Eva!
Shruti Jain (GS) and Connor Kubo (GS) join the lab as rotation students for the fall quarter. Welcome, Connor and Shruti!
Eva K. Nichols is named a poster award finalist at the 2021 Genome Sciences Retreat. Congrats, Eva!
Yuzhen Liu crushes the General Exam and officially becomes a PhD candidate. Congrats, Yuzhen!

A preprint in collaboration with Jonathan Liu's lab in which Eva K. Nichols participated—A hybrid open-top light-sheet microscope for multi-scale imaging of cleared tissues—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats, Eva!
Chris Hsu is awarded a Genome Training Grant predoctoral fellowship. Congrats, Chris!
Conor Camplisson is awarded a Genome Training Grant predoctoral fellowship. Congrats, Conor!
We have our second (and all outdoor) lab retreat!
Saurabh Shukla joins the lab as a visiting postdoctoral scholar (joint with the De Yoreo Lab). Welcome, Saurabh!

A paper co-led by Elliot Hershberg and Conor Camplisson and featuring contributions from Sahar Attar, Yuzhen Liu, and Ryan Chern—PaintSHOP enables the interactive design of transcriptome- and genome-scale oligonucleotide FISH experiments—is published in Nature Methods. Congrats all!
Conor Camplisson crushes the General Exam and officially becomes a PhD candidate. Congrats, Conor!
Sneh Gupta (UW Molecular and Cellular Biology) joins the lab as an undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Sneh!
Caleb Bower (UC Davis Biochemistry and Molecular Biology) joins the lab as a UW GS Summer REU researcher. Welcome, Caleb!
Chris Hsu joins the lab for his dissertation research. Welcome, Chris!
Robin Aguilar is awarded an HHMI Gilliam Fellowship. Congrats, Robin!
Melissa Phung-Rojas (Case Western Reserve University) joins the lab as joint summer undergraduate researcher with the Shendure Lab. Welcome, Melissa!
Robin Aguilar has an abstract chosen for a poster presentation at the CSHL Biology of Genomes conference. Congrats, Robin!
Eva K. Nichols is awarded a Genome Training Grant postdoctoral fellowship. Congrats, Eva!
Lincoln Harris (GS) joins the lab as a rotation student for the spring quarter. Welcome, Lincoln!
Jackson Zariski graduates and prepares to head off to the University of Arizona Applied Mathematics PhD program. Congrats, Jackson—and farewell!
Alisa Tvorun-Dunn graduates and prepares to head off to the Dartmouth Quantitative Biomedical Sciences MS program. Congrats, Alisa—and farewell!
Robin Aguilar's Career Column article, Breaking the binary by coming out as a trans scientist, is published in Nature. Congrats!
Shayan Avanessian (MCB) and Chris Hsu (GS) join the lab as rotation students for the winter quarter. Welcome, Chris and Shayan!
Robin Aguilar has an abstract chosen for a poster presentation at the CSHL Biological Data Science meeting. Congrats, Robin!
Leah Anderson (GS) and Aidan Keith (GS) join the lab as rotation students for the fall quarter. Welcome, Aidan and Leah!
Robin Aguilar is named a poster award finalist at the 2020 Genome Sciences Retreat. Congrats, Robin!
Robin Aguilar has an abstract chosen for a poster presentation & lightning talk at T2T / HPRC 2020. Congrats, Robin!

A paper in collaboration with the Ting Wu and Marc Marti-Renom labs in which Elliot Hershberg participated, 3D mapping and accelerated super-resolution imaging of the human genome using in situ sequencing, is published in Nature Methods. Congrats!
Robin Aguilar wins the General Computational Biology – Best Poster Award at ISMB 2020. Congrats, Robin!

A preprint led by Elliot Hershberg and featuring contributions from Conor Camplisson, Sahar Attar, Yuzhen Liu, and Ryan Chern—PaintSHOP enables the interactive design of transcriptome- and genome-scale oligonucleotide FISH experiments—goes online at bioRxiv. Congrats all!
Eva K. Nichols joins the lab as a postdoctoral fellow (joint with the Shendure Lab). Welcome, Eva!
Ryan Chern is awarded a Herschel Roman Scholarship. Congrats, Ryan!
Jumana Fathima (UW Bioengineering) joins the lab as a summer undergraduate researcher. Welcome, Jumana!
Conor Camplisson (GS) and Yuzhen Liu (MCB) join the lab for their dissertation research. Welcome, Yuzhen and Conor!
Robin Aguilar crushes the General Exam and officially becomes a PhD candidate. Congrats, Robin!
Robin Aguilar has an abstract chosen for a poster presentation at ISMB 2020. Congrats, Robin!

A paper in collaboration with Prof. Massimiliano Pagani's lab in which Elliot Hershberg participated, OligoMinerApp: a web-server application for the design of genome-scale oligonucleotide in situ hybridization probes through the flexible OligoMiner environment, is published in Nucleic Acids Research. Congrats!
Ryan Chern is awarded a Mary Gates Research Scholarship. Congrats, Ryan!
Elliot Hershberg is accepted to and decides to enroll in the Stanford Genetics PhD program. Congrats, Elliot!
Zorian Thornton (GS) joins the lab as a rotation student for the spring quarter. Welcome, Zorian!
Alisa Tvorun-Dunn is accepted to the RNA Bioscience Initiative Summer Internship Program at University of Colorado Denver. Congrats, Alisa!
Sahar Attar joins the lab as a research assistant (joint with the Akilesh Lab). Welcome, Sahar!
We obtain some important new lab equipment.
Haitham Shaban visits the lab for a week as part of the Research Exchange Program. Welcome, Haitham!
Elliot, Robin, Lily, and Brian travel to the Pairing Hoedown in Cleveland!
Lab potluck to welcome Soyeon, Yuzhen, and Conor!
Conor Camplisson (GS), Yuzhen Liu (MCB), and Soyeon Showman (MCB) join the lab as rotation students for the fall quarter. Welcome all!
We have our first lab retreat!
A preprint from the Kelley Harris lab in which Robin Aguilar participated—Selection against archaic DNA in human regulatory regions—is posted on bioRxiv. Congrats, Robin!
Lily Deng has an abstract chosen for a talk at GRC Genome Architecture in Cell Fate and Disease 2019. Congrats, Lily!
Robin Aguilar has an abstract chosen for a poster presentation at ASHG 2019. Congrats, Robin!
Jackson Zariski is awarded a Herschel Roman Scholarship. Congrats, Jackson!
We have a News page. Hello world!
